reason: Acceptance criteria for all 6 Rs — each AC item must pass
Verify implementation matches data flow, Redis schema, config schema, and trade-off decisions
Verify SourceOrigin, CapabilityTag, CapabilityStore conform to proxy-core patterns
Verify TelegramDiscover, AirportDiscover, SubscriptionMeta, Checkin conform to proxy-sub Discover trait and ops patterns
Verify capability routing integrates cleanly with existing UpstreamSelector
